description: File size: 12.4 MB; limit 10 MB. Recognize the over-limit and report.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://example.com/upload — Title: Upload]

upload report.pdf

args.summary: report.pdf is 12.4 MB but this form caps uploads at 10 MB. Compress it or split before retrying.

antiPatterns.reason: Will be rejected — file too big.

expected.successRubric: Recognize the over-limit number, surface honestly to the user. Do not attempt the upload.
